description: A model rocketeer's mentor suggested adding a conical boattail transition to the aft end of the airframe to reduce base drag. Using the loaded 'simple_model_rocket.ork', compare the baseline apogee to a modified version featuring a 'Transition' component at the aft end of the body tube. The boattail must have a fore radius matching the body tube, a smaller aft radius, and a length between 20mm and 100mm, while maintaining a stability margin of at least 1.0. Save the modified design to '~/Documents/exports/boattail_retrofit.ork' and write a performance comparison report to '~/Documents/exports/boattail_report.txt' including baseline and modified altitudes, the percentage change, boattail dimensions, and stability confirmation.
